lint-fix.name: Linter Fixes
lint-fix.description: Automatically fix linting errors and style issues

bug-finder.name: Bug Finder & Fixer
bug-finder.description: Identify and fix potential bugs in code

skill-groom.name: Skill Grooming
skill-groom.description: Audit and update project-local agent skills to match the current codebase. Use README.md as the primary project context for commands, architecture, and workflows.

build-optimize.name: Build Time Optimization
build-optimize.description: Optimize build configuration for faster builds

docs-backfill.name: Documentation Backfiller
docs-backfill.description: Generate missing documentation for undocumented functions, modules, and features

commit-normalize.name: Commit Message Normalizer
commit-normalize.description: Standardize recent commit message format to conventional commits

changelog-synth.name: Changelog Synthesizer
changelog-synth.description: Generate or update changelog from recent commits

release-notes.name: Release Note Drafter
release-notes.description: Draft release notes from recent changes

adr-draft.name: ADR Drafter
adr-draft.description: Draft Architecture Decision Records for significant patterns

ci-fixes.name: CI/CD Fixes
ci-fixes.description: Update outdated GitHub Actions, fix deprecated steps, add dependabot

readme-improvements.name: README Improvements
readme-improvements.description: Fix stale badges, broken links, missing sections

dead-code.name: Dead Code Removal
dead-code.description: Find and remove unused code using static analysis

code-quality.name: Code Quality Fixes
code-quality.description: Fix lint issues, type hints, error handling improvements

doc-drift.name: Doc Drift Detector
doc-drift.description: Detect documentation that's out of sync with code

semantic-diff.name: Semantic Diff Explainer
semantic-diff.description: Explain the semantic meaning of recent code changes

dependency-risk.name: Dependency Risk Scanner
dependency-risk.description: Analyze dependencies for security and maintenance risks

logging-audit.name: Logging Quality Auditor
logging-audit.description: Audit logging for completeness and quality

perf-regression.name: Performance Regression Spotter
perf-regression.description: Identify potential performance regressions in recent changes

pii-scanner.name: PII Exposure Scanner
pii-scanner.description: Scan for PII exposure: hardcoded PII, PII in logs, env secrets, unencrypted storage, gitignore gaps

privacy-policy.name: Privacy Policy Consistency Checker
privacy-policy.description: Check code against privacy policy claims

schema-evolution.name: Schema Evolution Advisor
schema-evolution.description: Analyze database schema changes for safety

event-taxonomy.name: Event Taxonomy Normalizer
event-taxonomy.description: Normalize event naming and structure across the codebase

roadmap-entropy.name: Roadmap Entropy Detector
roadmap-entropy.description: Detect roadmap scope creep and drift

knowledge-silo.name: Knowledge Silo Detector
knowledge-silo.description: Identify knowledge silos in the team

tech-debt-classify.name: Tech-Debt Classifier
tech-debt-classify.description: Classify and prioritize technical debt items

why-annotator.name: Why Does This Exist Annotator
why-annotator.description: Document the purpose of unclear or confusing code

edge-case-enum.name: Edge-Case Enumerator
edge-case-enum.description: Enumerate potential edge cases for functions and modules

error-msg-improve.name: Error-Message Improver
error-msg-improve.description: Suggest better, more actionable error messages

slo-suggester.name: SLO/SLA Candidate Suggester
slo-suggester.description: Suggest SLO/SLA candidates based on code analysis

a11y-lint.name: Accessibility Linting
a11y-lint.description: Non-checkbox accessibility analysis beyond automated tools

service-advisor.name: Should This Be a Service Advisor
service-advisor.description: Analyze whether code should be extracted as a separate service

oncall-estimator.name: Oncall Load Estimator
oncall-estimator.description: Estimate oncall load from code changes and architecture

idea-generator.name: Idea Generator
idea-generator.description: Generate improvement ideas for the codebase

perf-profile.name: Performance Profiling Runs
perf-profile.description: Run performance profiling on the codebase

allocation-profile.name: Allocation/Hot-Path Profiling
allocation-profile.description: Profile memory allocation and hot paths

repo-topology.name: Repo Topology Visualizer
repo-topology.description: Visualize repository module structure and dependencies

permissions-mapper.name: Permissions/Auth Surface Mapper
permissions-mapper.description: Map permissions and auth surfaces across the codebase

data-lifecycle.name: Data Lifecycle Tracer
data-lifecycle.description: Trace data lifecycle through the system

feature-flag-monitor.name: Feature Flag Lifecycle Monitor
feature-flag-monitor.description: Monitor feature flag usage and lifecycle

ci-signal-noise.name: CI Signal-to-Noise Scorer
ci-signal-noise.description: Score CI pipeline signal vs noise ratio

historical-context.name: Historical Context Summarizer
historical-context.description: Summarize historical context and evolution of code areas

rollback-plan.name: Rollback Plan Generator
rollback-plan.description: Generate rollback plans for recent changes

code-review.name: Code Review Expert
code-review.description: Expert code review: SOLID, security, performance, error handling, boundary conditions

perf-audit.name: Performance Audit & Fix
perf-audit.description: Audit and improve performance of web applications and services.

autoresearch.name: AutoResearch Experiment Loop
autoresearch.description: Run an autonomous improvement loop inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch pattern.

react-effect-cleanup.name: React Effect Cleanup
react-effect-cleanup.description: Find and fix React useEffect anti-patterns: derived state in effects, missing deps causing stale closures, chained effects, and setState-from-props. Pair with references/react-patterns.md for best-practice guidance.

react-image-fix.name: React Image Optimization Fixer
react-image-fix.description: Find and fix improper Image usage in React/Next.js: missing width/height causing layout shift, no alt text, missing blur placeholders for local images, no loading/error states, oversized images without srcSet. Pair with references/react-patterns.md.

lint-doctor-fix.name: Lint/Doctor Tool Fixer
lint-doctor-fix.description: Run the project's built-in linting or doctor tools (eslint, biome, ruff, clippy, react-doctor, golangci-lint, etc.) and fix what they auto-detect. Identify the right tool by scanning package.json scripts, Makefile, or project config. Only auto-fixable issues — do not change what the tools cannot fix.

best-practice-fix.name: Best-Practice Opinionated Fix
best-practice-fix.description: Pick ONE best-practice pattern from the reference library that matches the repo's language/framework, find occurrences, and fix them. Load references/react-patterns.md for JS/TS repos, references/opinionated-patterns.md for others. Fix only one pattern per run.
